preliminary_expected_failures.failure_reason: CP00-081 evidence files were not created yet; contract and closeout rows already pointed at docs/closeout-packs/cp00-081.
docs/closeout-packs/cp00-081/manifest.json did not exist before pack evidence creation.

claude_review_command.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --system-prompt "read-only code reviewer" --output-format json < CP00-081 diff prompt

evidence_summary.claude_review_dependency: One valid claude-opus-4-8 max read-only review completed before production_ready.
evidence_summary.upstream_boundary: CP00-081 consumes CP00-080 and requires upstream next_subphase RP00.P07.M00.S01.
evidence_summary.finding_resolution: Claude P3 C00-003 was fixed with additional contract-definition assertions; C00-001 and C00-002 are adjudicated by plan/gate validation.
evidence_summary.ldip_boundary: LDIP remains planning-only; no LDIP implementation is introduced by CP00-081.

notes: No real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, credential, or secret data was used.

CP00-081 is metadata-only and does not execute runtime error responses, retry, rollback, compensation, incident creation, observability writes, runtime permission, AuthZ, security trimming, audit, database, storage, idempotency, lock, product-state, review-queue, or LDIP implementation logic.

plan_generation_receipt.purpose: Regenerate closeout pack plan and next-pack queue after CP00-081 evidence assembly.
plan_generation_receipt.result_summary: Generated docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json with 1172 packs and 53806 units; generated docs/closeout-pack-plan/next-pack-queue.json with 13 locked/corrected next-queue packs; queue starts after CP00-081.
